  d) Dallas-sensor simulation

  D) Dump full debug info (settings + state, INI format)
  q) Force read settings
  F) Force MQTT discovery for ALL message IDs
  r) Reconnect WiFi & refresh MQTT/WS clients
  p) Reset PIC manually
  a) Send PR=A to identify PIC firmware version & type
  s/S) Toggle OTGW serial-simulation replay

  b) Blink LED 1 (5x)
  i) Initialize relay outputs
  u) GPIO output ON
  o) GPIO output OFF
  j) Read GPIO output state
  l) Toggle MyDEBUG
  f) Show MyDEBUG status
